name: io.github.Fisher521/burn-mcp-server
description: AI-powered reading triage MCP. 26 tools with a 24h burn timer. Read less, absorb more.

environmentVariables.name: BURN_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Long-lived MCP token from Burn App → Settings → MCP Server

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <BURN_MCP_TOKEN> — generate at https://burn451.cloud → Settings → MCP Server
